source_areas.description: Human-edited translation catalogs organized by product project, locale, category, and stable dotted translation key.
Python and shell tooling for validation, coverage, builds, locale creation, extraction, conversion, synchronization, and assisted translation.
AST-enforced docstrings and generated source-linked references for maintained tools, historical migrations, and regression tests.
Dated multilingual search-intent, long-tail keyword, canonical-origin, sitemap, route, and required-signal source contract.
Tracked translation, locale metadata, flags, manifests, compatibility files, and SEO artifacts served to consuming repositories.
GitHub Actions for validation, freshness, deterministic rebuilds, cache purge, reviewed synchronization, notification, security, and release packaging.

feature_surfaces.title: Translation source catalogs
feature_surfaces.description: Maintains English baseline and localized product catalogs with stable keys, named placeholders, and explicit fallback semantics.

feature_surfaces.title: Validation and coverage
feature_surfaces.description: Checks Draft-07 source shape, key compatibility, security markers, critical locale requirements, and unique-key translation completion.

feature_surfaces.title: Placeholder parity audit
feature_surfaces.description: Reports English-to-translation placeholder-set drift without mutating catalogs and provides an opt-in strict remediation gate.

feature_surfaces.title: Deterministic distribution build
feature_surfaces.description: Merges recognized source projects into content-versioned scoped bundles, aggregate bundles, completion manifests, and locale metadata.

feature_surfaces.title: Locale metadata API
feature_surfaces.description: Centralizes locale names, regions, directions, social metadata, language alternates, flags, and deterministic launch ordering.

feature_surfaces.title: Multilingual SEO manifest
feature_surfaces.description: Publishes dated search evidence, intent clusters, long-tail terms, canonical origins, sitemaps, and locale alternate templates for three public surfaces.

feature_surfaces.title: Upstream key synchronization
feature_surfaces.description: Extracts translatable module and interface keys from Core and Cloud checkouts into reviewable locale-source changes.

feature_surfaces.title: Consumer bundle synchronization
feature_surfaces.description: Copies generated bundles into supported sibling repositories and removes stale locale copies under explicit project configuration.

feature_surfaces.title: Assisted translation
feature_surfaces.description: Optionally sends selected public translation strings to OpenAI and writes draft locale values for mandatory human review.

feature_surfaces.title: Release and cache automation
feature_surfaces.description: Validates source, prevents stale output, rebuilds generated artifacts, purges CDN paths, notifies consumers, and packages tagged releases.
verification: Review GitHub Actions results for validation, freshness, build, cache, and release events

feature_surfaces.title: Source-linked Python documentation
feature_surfaces.description: Requires docstrings and a current generated source reference for every Python class, function, nested function, method, and test.
